title: Files, Paths, CSV, JSON, and Data Boundaries · Stakeholder Software Mission
summary: A nonprofit operations coordinator. Staff need repeatable CSV and JSON validation with explainable corrections and safe outputs. Planned artifact: Deliver Community Program Data Quality Report with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Merge mappings and update nested records with explicit conflict, copy, and schema policies.
Match exception handlers to the hierarchy and catch the narrow failures the current boundary can recover from.
Use pathlib to compose, inspect, resolve, traverse, and constrain filesystem paths portably.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
